text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰🇱🇧 US‑Iran talks in Islamabad ended without a breakthrough after nine hours. Iran presented reasonable initiatives but excessive U.S. demands prevented a framework, Per Tasnim. The Key obstacles: Lebanon and the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. refused…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 CNN : U.S. Vice President JD Vance said no agreement was reached with Iran after 21 hours of marathon talks in Islamabad, with the US giving its “final and best offer." Iran’s lead negotiator, parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, said the US failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation. Primary sticking points included Iran’s refusal to abandon its nuclear programme. The future of the two‑week ceasefire and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz are now in doubt. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰🇱🇧 据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，美伊伊斯兰堡会谈在进行九小时后无果而终。伊朗提出了合理的倡议，但美国过分的要求阻碍了框架的达成。主要障碍：黎巴嫩和霍尔木兹海峡。美国拒绝……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）：美国副总统万斯表示，在伊斯兰堡进行了21小时的马拉松式会谈后，美伊双方未达成任何协议，美国已给出了“最终且最好的方案”。伊朗首席谈判代表、议长卡利巴夫表示，美国未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。主要分歧点包括伊朗拒绝放弃其核计划。为期两周的停火协议的未来以及霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放目前均存疑。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf: "The United States failed to gain Iran’s trust in response to our initiatives." ➡️ Before the negotiations, I emphasized that we have the necessary goodwill and determination, but due to the experiences of the previous two wars, we do not trust the other side. ➡️ My colleagues in the Iranian delegation at “Minab 168” presented forward-looking initiatives, but in the end, the other side failed to earn the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of talks. ➡️ The United States understood our logic and principles, and now it is time for it to decide whether it can gain our trust or not. ➡️ At all times, we consider “power-based diplomacy” as another approach alongside military struggle to secure the rights of the Iranian people, and we will not cease for a moment our efforts to consolidate the achievements of 40 days of Iran’s national defense. ➡️ I appreciate the efforts of the friendly and brotherly country of Pakistan in facilitating this negotiation process, and I send my greetings to the people of Pakistan. ➡️ Iran is one body with 90 million souls. I thank the entire heroic nation of Iran, who—following the guidance of the Supreme Leader—supported their compatriots by taking to the streets and sending their prayers with us. I also commend my colleagues for their efforts in these intensive 21-hour negotiations. ➡️ Long live and prosper beloved Iran! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫：“美国在回应我们的倡议时未能赢得伊朗的信任。” ➡️ 在谈判前，我强调我们有必要的善意和决心，但由于前两次战争的经历，我们不信任对方。 ➡️ 我在“Minab 168”伊朗代表团的同事们提出了前瞻性的倡议，但最终，对方在本轮会谈中未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。 ➡️ 美国理解了我们的逻辑和原则，现在是时候由它来决定能否赢得我们的信任了。 ➡️ 我们始终将“基于实力的外交”视为与军事斗争并行的另一种途径，以捍卫伊朗人民的权利，我们将一刻也不会停止巩固伊朗40天国防成就的努力。 ➡️ 我感谢友好兄弟国家巴基斯坦为促成此次谈判进程所做的努力，并向巴基斯坦人民致以问候。 ➡️ 伊朗是一个拥有9000万灵魂的统一整体。我感谢全体英雄的伊朗人民，他们遵循最高领袖的指导，通过走上街头支持他们的同胞，并与我们一同祈祷。我也赞扬我的同事们在这次紧张的21小时谈判中所付出的努力。 ➡️ 伟大的伊朗万岁，繁荣昌盛！ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Argentina’s debt to the IMF has climbed about 36% over the past year to roughly $57 billion, largely due to a new $20 billion. The new disbursements have increased Argentina’s total exposure, making it the IMF’s largest borrower.
text_zh: 阿根廷对国际货币基金组织（IMF）的债务在过去一年中攀升了约36%，达到约570亿美元，这主要归因于新增的200亿美元贷款。新的拨款增加了阿根廷的总风险敞口，使其成为IMF最大的借款国。

text: Iranian lawmaker says if the US does not pay war compensation, Iran will seize and sell hostile ships in the Persian Gulf.
text_zh: 伊朗议员表示，如果美国不支付战争赔偿，伊朗将扣押并出售波斯湾内的敌对船只。

text: The Spectator Index Iran's Speaker of Parliament Mohammad Ghalibaf says that 'due to the experiences of the two previous wars, we have no trust in the opposing side'. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043275436399149447/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel BIGGER PICTURE: HORMUZ Iran’s main leverage is the Strait of Hormuz, with roughly 20% of global oil flows passing through it. By flexing control, the regime is playing its strongest card. But that move comes with MASSIVE consequences. Since the Hormuz is weaponized, the world will now accelerate its workarounds: •Saudi Arabia will most definitely expand its East-West pipeline capacity •Gulf states will begin invest heavily in alternative export routes •Israel will emerge as a potential corridor for energy transit These shifts won’t happen overnight, but they are now inevitable. What this means: The more Iran leans on Hormuz, the faster global energy flows reroute around it. Over time, that erodes Tehran’s leverage and cuts into its long-term power. Bottom line, we will see some short-term pressure as the regime plays its strongest hand. Long term, this is a massive strategic failure of historic scale that will come back to bite them very hard. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 大局观：霍尔木兹海峡。伊朗的主要筹码是霍尔木兹海峡，全球约20%的石油流量经此通过。通过展示控制力，该政权正在打出其最强的一张牌。但这一举动会带来巨大的后果。由于霍尔木兹海峡被武器化，世界现在将加速寻找替代方案：•沙特阿拉伯肯定会扩大其东西向管道的输送能力 •海湾国家将开始大力投资替代出口路线 •以色列将成为能源过境的潜在走廊。这些转变不会在一夜之间发生，但现在已不可避免。这意味着：伊朗越依赖霍尔木兹海峡，全球能源流绕过它的速度就越快。随着时间的推移，这将削弱德黑兰的筹码并削减其长期权力。总之，随着该政权打出其最强手牌，我们将看到一些短期压力。从长远来看，这是一个历史规模的巨大战略失败，最终将严重反噬他们。推文

text: WarTranslated Peskov says the so-called SVO will continue after the Easter truce until Zelensky “finds the courage” to make peace with Russia. The Easter truce between Ukraine and Russia just started. It runs from 16:00 on April 11 to the end of April 12. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 佩斯科夫表示，所谓的特别军事行动（SVO）将在复活节停火后继续，直到泽连斯基“找到勇气”与俄罗斯实现和平。乌克兰和俄罗斯之间的复活节停火刚刚开始。停火时间为4月11日16:00至4月12日结束。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @VeryBrexitProbs : MAGA thinks Europe can't defend itself without America. Here's what they don't know. 1. France and Britain have 515 nuclear warheads and 8 nuclear missile submarines. 2. European defence spending hit €481 billion this year. That's more than Russia and China spend combined. The EU's ReArm Europe plan is mobilising another €800 billion. 3. European countries have over 1.7 million active troops. Russia has 1.3 million. 4. EU and UK air forces fly over 1,400 combat aircraft. Their navies have five aircraft carriers, over 60 submarines, more than 120 frigates and destroyers. 5. Europe has over 6,000 artillery pieces and that's before the biggest rearmament wave since the Cold War. Poland alone is adding 212 new howitzers. 6. The British SAS invented modern special forces. The US copied them to build Delta Force. From France's Foreign Legion to Poland's GROM, Europe's elite units are among the deadliest on earth. 7. Europe already has joint military commands ready to fight. The UK leads a 10-nation rapid reaction force across Northern Europe and the Arctic. Finland alone can mobilise 900,000 trained reservists all prepared to fight in arctic conditions. 8. Europe has its own satellite navigation (Galileo), its own defence programme (75 active projects) and is building its own rapid deployment force. The "helpless Europe" story was never about defence. It was about keeping Europe dependent and buying American weapons, relying on American intelligence, following American foreign policy. Thanks to Trump, that now ends. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix RT @VeryBrexitProbs：MAGA（让美国再次伟大）认为没有美国，欧洲就无法自卫。这是他们不知道的事实。1. 法国和英国拥有515枚核弹头和8艘核潜艇。2. 今年欧洲国防开支达到4810亿欧元。这超过了俄罗斯和中国的总和。欧盟的“重整欧洲”计划正在动员另外8000亿欧元。3. 欧洲国家拥有超过170万现役军人。俄罗斯有130万。4. 欧盟和英国空军拥有超过1400架作战飞机。他们的海军拥有5艘航空母舰、60多艘潜艇、120多艘护卫舰和驱逐舰。5. 欧洲拥有超过6000门火炮，这还是在冷战以来最大规模的重整军备浪潮之前。仅波兰就增加了212门新榴弹炮。6. 英国SAS发明了现代特种部队。美国效仿他们建立了三角洲部队。从法国外籍军团到波兰GROM，欧洲的精英部队是世界上最致命的部队之一。7. 欧洲已经拥有随时准备战斗的联合军事指挥部。英国领导着一支覆盖北欧和北极的10国快速反应部队。仅芬兰就能动员90万名受过训练的预备役人员，他们都准备在北极条件下作战。8. 欧洲拥有自己的卫星导航系统（伽利略）、自己的防御计划（75个活跃项目），并正在建立自己的快速部署部队。“无助的欧洲”故事从来不是关于防御的。它是关于保持欧洲的依赖性，购买美国武器，依赖美国情报，追随美国外交政策。多亏了特朗普，这一切现在结束了。推文

text: Nuno Felix Diz-me com quem andas e diremos quem és. Amanhã, a Hungria vai a votos 🇭🇺 @PM_ViktorOrban Orbán volta a ir a jogo… e os resultados falam por si 💪 Uma das taxas de natalidade mais altas da União Europeia, vários anos acima de 1,5 filhos por mulher 📊 Crescimento económico com ambição acima da média europeia 📈 Nada disto é por acaso. É o resultado de políticas que colocam o país, as famílias e a soberania em primeiro lugar ✋ Amanhã, os húngaros decidem. E a Europa devia prestar atenção. Mais soberania, menos submissão 🔥 #Hungria #Eleições #Orbán #Soberania #Europa #Portugal #Chega 🇵🇹 - Pedro dos Santos Frazão tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 物以类聚，人以群分。明天，匈牙利将进行投票 🇭🇺 @PM_ViktorOrban 欧尔班再次出战……结果不言自明 💪 欧盟最高的出生率之一，连续多年保持在每名女性生育1.5个孩子以上 📊 经济增长雄心高于欧洲平均水平 📈 这一切都不是偶然的。这是将国家、家庭和主权放在首位的政策结果 ✋ 明天，匈牙利人将做出决定。欧洲应该注意了。更多主权，更少顺从 🔥 #匈牙利 #选举 #欧尔班 #主权 #欧洲 #葡萄牙 #Chega 🇵🇹 - Pedro dos Santos Frazão 推文

text: WarTranslated Swedish Coast Guard detained the Panama-flagged bulk carrier Hui Yuan near Ystad after aircraft spotted it dumping coal waste, SVT reports. It was en route from Ust-Luga to Las Palmas and is now anchored off Sweden. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043262809354445178/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 据SVT报道，瑞典海岸警卫队在飞机发现巴拿马籍散货船“惠源”号倾倒煤渣后，在伊斯塔德附近将其扣留。该船原定从乌斯季卢加前往拉斯帕尔马斯，目前停泊在瑞典近海。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043262809354445178/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @AdamKinzinger : "The Lego videos are funny. The situation is not. A theocracy that blocks its own people's access to the internet is currently running circles around the United States in the information space of an active conflict. That does not happen by accident. It happens because one side prepared and the other side burned down its own capacity and called it a victory for free speech." (Link in reply) tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @AdamKinzinger：“乐高视频很有趣。但情况并不好笑。一个阻止本国人民访问互联网的神权国家，目前在活跃冲突的信息空间中将美国玩弄于股掌之间。这并非偶然。这是因为一方做了准备，而另一方烧毁了自己的能力，并称之为言论自由的胜利。”（回复中有链接）推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇺🇸 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has decided to delay his trip to the United Nations and the United States in order to continue managing the government’s work from Beirut amid the current internal situation. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇸🇾 MTV: Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has postponed his U.S. visit after internal advice warned of a potential trap involving an alleged secret meeting with an Israeli envoy. He may face pressure to meet Israeli representatives, risking domestic backlash. The visit has not been cancelled. Lebanese officials confirmed that Lebanon has separated its issue from Iran’s in preliminary talks with the U.S. and Israel, insisting on a ceasefire before negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆决定推迟前往联合国和美国的行程，以便在当前国内局势下继续从贝鲁特管理政府工作。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇸🇾 MTV：黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆推迟了访美行程，此前有内部建议警告称，这可能涉及与以色列特使进行秘密会晤的陷阱。他可能面临会见以色列代表的压力，从而引发国内反弹。访问并未取消。黎巴嫩官员证实，黎巴嫩在与美国和以色列的初步会谈中已将其问题与伊朗问题分开，坚持在谈判前实现停火。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 US‑Iran talks in Islamabad ended without a breakthrough after nine hours. Iran presented reasonable initiatives but excessive U.S. demands prevented a framework, Per Tasnim. The Key obstacles: Lebanon and the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. refused to include Lebanon in any deal with Iran, wanting to hand the issue entirely to Israel. On Hormuz, Washington sought to open it now without a future Iranian role. Iran insists no change to the strait’s status unless a reasonable agreement is reached. The U.S. proposed that enriched uranium be removed from Iranian soil – a red line for Tehran. Another round may take place within 7‑10 days with a different U.S. delegation level, Per Al-Araby Al-Jadeed. Israel believes the ceasefire may be extended to allow continued contacts, Per Kan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 美伊伊斯兰堡会谈在进行九小时后无果而终。据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，伊朗提出了合理的倡议，但美国过分的要求阻碍了框架的达成。主要障碍：黎巴嫩和霍尔木兹海峡。美国拒绝将黎巴嫩纳入与伊朗的任何协议，希望将该问题完全交给以色列。关于霍尔木兹海峡，华盛顿试图在没有伊朗未来参与的情况下立即开放它。伊朗坚持除非达成合理协议，否则海峡地位不得改变。美国提议将浓缩铀从伊朗领土移走——这对德黑兰来说是一条红线。据《新阿拉伯人报》报道，另一轮会谈可能会在7-10天内由不同级别的美国代表团进行。据Kan报道，以色列认为停火可能会延长，以允许继续接触。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 A cat from Sevastopol is ready for Easter too 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Bushehr fishermen caught an Orbiter drone belonging to the Zionist regime.

text: 🟡 Hezbollah Military Media of the Islamic Resistance: Scenes from the operation of the Islamic Resistance targeting the Liman and Sharaga bases belonging to the Israeli enemy army in northern occupied Palestine with a swarm of dive drones. #Military_Media
text_zh: 🟡 伊斯兰抵抗运动真主党军事媒体：伊斯兰抵抗运动使用蜂群自杀式无人机袭击以色列敌军在被占领的巴勒斯坦北部利曼（Liman）和沙拉加（Sharaga）基地的行动画面。 #军事_媒体

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🛢️ Saudi Arabia has restored the East–West oil pipeline and the Manifa field to full operation. ▪️ The facilities are now functioning normally again. ▪️ Earlier attacks had reduced production at the Manifa field by 300,000 barrels per day and cut pipeline transport by 700,000 barrels per day. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🛢️ 沙特阿拉伯已恢复东西向输油管道和曼尼法（Manifa）油田的全面运营。▪️ 设施现已恢复正常运作。▪️ 此前的袭击导致曼尼法油田产量减少了每天30万桶，管道运输量减少了每天70万桶。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: “Before the negotiations, I emphasized that we have the necessary good faith and will, but due to the experiences of the two previous wars, we have no trust in the opposing side. My colleagues on the Iranian delegation Minaab168 raised forward-looking initiatives, but the opposing side ultimately failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of negotiations.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：“在谈判前，我强调我们有必要的善意和意愿，但由于前两次战争的经历，我们对对方没有任何信任。我在伊朗代表团的同事Minaab168提出了前瞻性的倡议，但对方最终在本轮谈判中未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : This is the best upsum I’ve read, although I confess to being biased given the authorship. Key line: “The new norm involves periodic precision strikes against Iran, deployed not for the purpose of regime change but for containment. Tehran, in turn, will be forced to internalize a posture of resistance it has spent decades exporting and leading from the rear.” The end of American restraint broke a quarter-century taboo & shattered Iran's doctrine of exporting its wars. Once that happened, any US policy shifts stopped being the determining factor of where the Third Gulf War takes the region. With @KamranBokhari https://newlinesmag.com/essays/the-third-gulf-war-and-its-aftermath/ - Hassan I. Hassan tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss：这是我读过的最好的总结，尽管我承认由于作者身份，我可能存在偏见。关键句：“新的常态涉及对伊朗进行周期性的精确打击，其目的不是为了政权更迭，而是为了遏制。德黑兰反过来将被迫内化一种它几十年来一直在出口和从后方领导的抵抗姿态。” 美国克制的终结打破了四分之一个世纪的禁忌，粉碎了伊朗输出战争的学说。一旦发生这种情况，任何美国政策的转变都不再是决定第三次海湾战争将把该地区带向何方的决定性因素。与 @KamranBokhari https://newlinesmag.com/essays/the-third-gulf-war-and-its-aftermath/ - Hassan I. Hassan 推文

text: 📸 Türkiye's ASELSAN announces that mass production and delivery of homegrown LGK-82 laser guidance kits is ongoing after completing factory acceptance tests. The kit is designed for high-precision strikes against fixed and moving targets with reduced collateral damage.
text_zh: 📸 土耳其ASELSAN宣布，在完成工厂验收测试后，国产LGK-82激光制导套件的批量生产和交付正在进行中。该套件旨在对固定和移动目标进行高精度打击，并减少附带损害。

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Zionist occupiers are deliberately intensifying the humanitarian crisis in Gaza by extensively restricting the entry of aid, including flour, which has led to a continuous increase in bread prices amid severe poverty in Gaza. - Hamas
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 犹太复国主义占领者通过广泛限制包括面粉在内的援助物资进入，蓄意加剧加沙的人道主义危机，导致加沙在严重贫困中面包价格持续上涨。 - 哈马斯

text: Iran's Ghalibaf on failed negotiations with the U.S. in Pakistan: We have the necessary goodwill and determination, but due to the experience of two previous wars, we do not trust the other side. The other side ultimately failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of negotiations America has understood our logic and principles. Now it is time for it to decide whether it can earn our trust or not. We consider ‘power diplomacy’ another method alongside military struggle to secure the rights of the Iranian nation.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫谈与美国在巴基斯坦的失败谈判：我们有必要的善意和决心，但由于前两次战争的经历，我们不信任对方。对方最终在本轮谈判中未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。美国理解了我们的逻辑和原则。现在是时候由它来决定能否赢得我们的信任了。我们认为“实力外交”是与军事斗争并行的另一种捍卫伊朗民族权利的方法。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said that after 21 hours of intense talks in Islamabad, the U.S. failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation. “America understood our logic and principles. Now it is time for them to decide whether they can earn our trust,” he stated. Ghalibaf noted that Iran had good faith and will, but due to the experience of two previous wars, there is no trust in the US. He described “diplomacy of power” as another path alongside military struggle to secure Iran’s rights. He thanked Pakistan for facilitating the talks and praised the Iranian people for their support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，在伊斯兰堡进行了21小时的紧张会谈后，美国未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。“美国理解了我们的逻辑和原则。现在是时候由他们来决定能否赢得我们的信任了，”他说道。卡利巴夫指出，伊朗有善意和意愿，但由于前两次战争的经历，对美国没有信任。他将“实力外交”描述为与军事斗争并行的另一条捍卫伊朗权利的道路。他感谢巴基斯坦促成此次会谈，并赞扬伊朗人民的支持。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iran's Parliament Speaker Qalibaf: — US failed to earn Iran’s trust despite Iran’s goodwill and constructive proposals during the latest round of talks. — Iran entered the negotiations with serious intent, but past experiences from previous wars left Tehran skeptical. — Iran’s delegation presented forward-looking initiatives, yet the other side ultimately could not build confidence. — The US now understands Iran’s principles and must decide whether it can gain Iran’s trust. — Iran views “power diplomacy” as a key tool alongside military resistance to secure the nation’s rights, and will not stop working to consolidate the achievements of its 40 days of national defense. — Grateful to 'friendly and brotherly' Pakistan for hosting. — Iran is one body with 90 million souls. I thank all the heroic people of Iran who, following the advice of the Supreme Leader and by being present in the streets, supported their children and accompanied us with their prayers, and I say well done to my colleagues in these intense 21-hour negotiations. Long live and prosper dear Iran!
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：— 尽管伊朗在最新一轮会谈中表现出善意并提出了建设性建议，但美国未能赢得伊朗的信任。— 伊朗带着严肃的意图参加了谈判，但过去战争的经历让德黑兰持怀疑态度。— 伊朗代表团提出了前瞻性的倡议，但对方最终未能建立信心。— 美国现在理解了伊朗的原则，必须决定是否能赢得伊朗的信任。— 伊朗将“实力外交”视为与军事抵抗并行的关键工具，以捍卫国家权利，并将继续努力巩固其40天国防成就。— 感谢“友好兄弟”巴基斯坦的接待。— 伊朗是一个拥有9000万灵魂的统一整体。我感谢所有英雄的伊朗人民，他们遵循最高领袖的建议，通过走上街头支持他们的孩子，并与我们一同祈祷，我也为我在这次紧张的21小时谈判中的同事们感到骄傲。伟大的伊朗万岁，繁荣昌盛！

text: 🇮🇷 “Americans need this agreement more than we do” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi exclusively to RT “If they don’t accept our terms, we’ll go our own way — nothing will change”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “美国人比我们更需要这份协议” — 伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹独家回应RT “如果他们不接受我们的条款，我们将走自己的路 — 一切都不会改变”

text: 🇮🇷 RT exclusive: “All vessels entering the Strait of Hormuz must pay tolls under a new control system” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi “Government must establish full management and control of the Strait based on national interests”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 RT独家：“所有进入霍尔木兹海峡的船只必须根据新的控制系统支付通行费” — 伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹 “政府必须根据国家利益建立对海峡的全面管理和控制”

text: 🇮🇷 “We simply do not trust the Americans” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi to RT “How can a nation built on arrogance and colonialism respect others or honor its agreements?”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “我们根本不信任美国人” — 伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹回应RT “一个建立在傲慢和殖民主义基础上的国家，怎么可能尊重他人或遵守其协议？”

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 Ukraine will open the "Druzhba" oil pipeline immediately after the elections in Hungary, Orban believes. "We will win the elections and the next morning, the Ukrainians will open it," he told RIA Novosti. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 欧尔班认为，乌克兰将在匈牙利选举后立即开放“友谊”输油管道。“我们将赢得选举，第二天早上，乌克兰人就会开放它，”他告诉俄新社。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
